description: Style Note This season's french connection line features bold animal prints in bags with a fantastical burst of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season wardrobe.  Product Details Black textured clutch bag with a satchel style buckle and a flap Has a zipped pocket inside the main compartment Material and Care Jute Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Height: 15 cm Width: 30 cm Style NoteThis season's French Connection line features clutches with a fantastical burst of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season wardrobe. Product DetailsBlack textured clutch bag with a satchel style buckle and a flapHas a zipped pocket inside the main compartmentMaterial and CareJuteWipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 15 cmWidth: 30 cm
